_meta.purpose: Sample HighLevel webhook payload for the ContactCreate event. Shape is approximate and reflects HighLevel v2 (api.leadconnectorhq.com / services.leadconnectorhq.com) as of 2026. Use this as a reference when building your webhook receiver — verify the live shape against your own test deliveries.

headers_to_expect.x-wh-signature: <HMAC-SHA256 hex of the raw body, signed with the webhook signing secret issued in the Marketplace app>
headers_to_expect.x-wh-id: <unique webhook delivery id — use for de-duplication>

receiver_requirements: Verify x-wh-signature with timing-safe comparison before trusting the body.
De-duplicate by x-wh-id across at least the last 24h.
